modelName: Final Correlation-Aware Player Prop Model V1
claimBoundary: This is a projection-calibrated, context-aware, portfolio-guarded final-model candidate engine, not a forward-proven betting model. It keeps full-board coverage, but selected picks now require a live line and 3+ books; locked-forward rows, market lines, settlements, and audit PASS are still required before live-edge claims.

componentEvidence.label: holdout_stable_premium_90_six_per_day
componentEvidence.rule: holdout-stable 90 premium lane: union of 27 high-precision top200/tail200plus pockets; deduped to one highest-confidence market per player per slate. Pocket discovery used the first 110 walk-forward dates, then required the last 55 dates to hold the 90% line before inclusion.

componentEvidence.label: all_min200_premium_pts_over_agreement_sweet_spot
componentEvidence.rule: all 200+ sample-qualified 90 premium lane: one PTS market per player, player_override OVER, HGB side OVER, projection side OVER, abs projection gap >= 0.5 and < 1.25, projected minutes >= 20 and < 24, HGB confidence >= 0.780 and < 0.850

componentEvidence.label: top200_sample_count
componentEvidence.rule: top200_sample_count: one highest wfConfidence market per player, wfConfidence >= 0.890

componentEvidence.label: top200_meta_reliability_expanded
componentEvidence.rule: top200 meta reliability gate: one highest metaProbCorrect market per player, metaProbCorrect >= 0.825 and wfConfidence >= 0.750

componentEvidence.label: all_min200_coverage_frontier_projection_disagreement
componentEvidence.rule: all 200+ sample-qualified coverage frontier: one largest-gap PTS/REB/AST market per player, player_override side must disagree with projection side, abs projection gap >= 1.0, projected minutes >= 24

componentEvidence.label: top200_recent_form_projection_fade_under
componentEvidence.rule: top200 recent-form projection fade: one largest-gap PTS/REB/AST market per player, player_override side UNDER, projection side OVER, abs projection gap >= 1.0, projected minutes >= 28

componentEvidence.label: top200_sample_count
componentEvidence.rule: top200_sample_count: one highest wfConfidence market per player, wfConfidence >= 0.840

componentEvidence.label: Precision Parlay / snapshot-parlay-precision-v1
componentEvidence.rule: Use the parlay model's one-player, market-cap, same-game, same-team, and counting-over controls as the portfolio construction layer.

componentEvidence.label: Live Quality Full Season Router V9
componentEvidence.rule: Use V9 runtime final side and joint-feasibility ideas as a backend quality router, not as an unbounded pick source.

warnings: Input score artifact is stale: slate 2026-05-09, current ET date 2026-05-11. Preview only.
The model intentionally underfilled rather than force weak, unavailable, or correlated picks.
4 selected pick(s) carry role, source, gap, book-depth, or game-context risk flags.
Estimated accuracy priors are component priors, not calibrated forward probabilities.
